name: backend-api
_comment: Fastify REST API server. Deployed to Railway via Dockerfile.api. Listens on $API_PORT (default 3001)

scripts._comment_dev: Hot-reload dev server using tsx (TypeScript executor)
scripts._comment_openapi: Generates OpenAPI spec JSON for documentation
scripts._comment_build: Compile TS → dist/, then generate OpenAPI spec from compiled routes
scripts._comment_start: Production entry point — Railway/Docker runs this after build
